# OutbreakDayZ

> A US-based DayZ community server. Hardcore survival on Chernarus, Livonia, and Namalsk.

## Pages

- [/](https://outbreakdayz.com/) — Home: server overview, features, recent events.
- [/servers](https://outbreakdayz.com/servers) — All active servers with connect strings and BattleMetrics links.
- [/how-to-connect](https://outbreakdayz.com/how-to-connect) — Step-by-step join guide for new players.
- [/rules](https://outbreakdayz.com/rules) — Server rules.
- [/mods](https://outbreakdayz.com/mods) — Required and optional mods with Steam Workshop links and load order.
- [/map](https://outbreakdayz.com/map) — Operational map of Chernarus with safezones, military bases, and PVP zones.
- [/events](https://outbreakdayz.com/events) — Upcoming and past community events.
- [/news](https://outbreakdayz.com/news) — News, server wipes, and patch notes.
- [/community](https://outbreakdayz.com/community) — Discord, staff, and content creators.
- [/shop](https://outbreakdayz.com/shop) — Donation tiers (cosmetic perks only, no pay-to-win).

## Notes

- Audience: US-based DayZ players, English only.
- Stack: Astro 5+, Tailwind, fully static.
- Not affiliated with Bohemia Interactive.
